overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a futuristic urban rooftop promenade during golden hour. The character walks along elevated concrete platforms, observes flying vehicles and megatowers, and ascends a large public staircase among crowds of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop observation deck with monorail tracks

events.description: character begins walking forward from standing position
camera tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles passing overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated platform and looking up at the flying traffic and megatowers

entered.detail: wide concrete rooftop walkway with metal railings
elevated train tracks running above the platform
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows
massive cylindrical industrial structure with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an elevated concrete rooftop platform during golden hour. As they begin walking, the camera tilts up to reveal flying vehicles passing along overhead monorail tracks against a warm sunset sky, with massive megatowers rising in the background.

events.description: character pauses to look over railing at street level below
passing by NPCs seated on concrete benches

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade and observing the cityscape and street traffic below

notable_agents.action: couple sitting on a concrete bench looking at handheld devices

entered.detail: tall corporate tower with vertical illuminated signage
multi-lane road visible below the elevated platform
simple concrete seating along the walkway railing

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the elevated promenade as the camera pans down from the sky to reveal the street level below. The Arasaka tower dominates the left skyline while the character passes NPCs seated on benches, observing the sparse traffic moving along the roads beneath the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit hub approach with commercial signage

events.description: approaching the wide public staircase and transit building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward and beginning to climb the large public staircase among other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians descending the stairs
woman in athletic wear standing on stairs using phone

entered.detail: yellow and black commercial building with large DELAMAIN signage
broad concrete staircase leading to upper transit level
illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major transit hub with the Delamain building visible ahead. The crowd density increases as pedestrians move in opposing directions. The character reaches the wide public staircase and begins ascending toward the upper plaza level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper transit plaza with corporate architecture

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and continues forward

agents.ego_description: finishing the stair ascent and walking through the crowded upper plaza toward the transit entrance

notable_agents.action: man in white underwear walking down the stairs

entered.detail: open concrete plaza at the top of the stairs with transit access
large glass and steel building entrance with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character completes the stair ascent into a crowded upper plaza. The Delamain building facade dominates the view ahead while pedestrians move through the transit hub entrance. The environment transitions from the open promenade to the semi-covered transit plaza with commercial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an elevated urban promenade that transitions from an open rooftop vista into a crowded transit plaza. It begins on a concrete platform during golden hour, with the camera tilting upward to capture flying vehicles and massive megatowers silhouetted against a warm sunset sky. As the character moves forward, the camera pans down from the skyline to reveal the street level below and the dominating Arasaka tower while passing NPCs resting on benches. The scene then shifts toward a bustling transit hub where the crowd density increases, leading the character to ascend a wide public staircase. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the upper plaza, where the open promenade gives way to the semi-covered commercial architecture of the Delamain building.
